title: Jack at 16 Months
excerpt: It's hard to believe this guy is 16 months already. He took his first steps (5 of them in Florida) a week before turning 14 months. Then he would only occasionally walk for us, as crawling was a super quick…
body:
It's hard to believe this guy is 16 months already. He took his first steps (5 of them in Florida) a week before turning 14 months. Then he would only occasionally walk for us, as crawling was a super quick mode of transportation. Right when he turned 15 months, he decided to give it more of a go and hasn't stopped since. It's getting harder and harder to get him to sit still for a photo, but his silliness is just too cute not to capture. Thankfully Jamie Waters is such a great photographer.

A friend from Australia (I met her and her adorable son on my last Spotlight tour) started the cutest line of ties and bowties for little guys. She was kind enough to send some items over from her shop along with some hand me downs and new stuff from one of my favorite stores - Bonds. Check out Hugo's Wardrobe here.
